results.title: Airtel Nigeria Drives Q1 Growth As Revenue Jumps 50 Percent
results.description: Nigeria emerged as Airtel Africa Plc’s strongest growth market in the quarter ended June 30, 2026, with the telecom operator posting a 50.4 per cent increase in reported revenue, supported by strong demand for data services, higher customer spending and the full impact of tariff adjustments implemented in late 2025. The group’s unaudited financial results... The post Airtel Nigeria Drives Q1 Growth As Revenue Jumps 50 Percent appeared first on New Telegraph .

results.title: Billionaire Adani Weighs Airline Launch In Indian Duopoly Market, Sources Say
results.description: The Adani Group is exploring plans to enter India’s airline sector by launching a new carrier or acquiring a stake in an existing airline, according to sources. The move could increase competition in a market dominated by IndiGo and Air India. The group, which operates eight airports, has not taken a final decision yet.
